industry.name: Space Industry
industry.description: Spacecraft design, propulsion, launch operations, mission control, and the commercial space economy. 90 roles across 6 clusters.

roles.title: Spacecraft Design Engineer 1
roles.description: Designs spacecraft structures and subsystems under senior guidance, translating mission requirements into hardware.

roles.title: Avionics Engineer
roles.description: Designs and tests the electronic systems — flight computers, power, sensors — that control spacecraft.

roles.title: Spacecraft Systems Engineer
roles.description: Integrates all spacecraft subsystems into a coherent design, managing requirements and trade-offs across the vehicle.

roles.title: Thermal Engineer
roles.description: Designs the thermal control systems that keep spacecraft within survivable temperatures in the extremes of space.

roles.title: GNC Engineer
roles.description: Develops the guidance, navigation, and control algorithms that steer and stabilize spacecraft.

roles.title: Senior Spacecraft Systems Engineer
roles.description: Leads spacecraft systems engineering across the full mission lifecycle from concept through in-orbit operations.

roles.title: Chief Engineer (Spacecraft)
roles.description: Holds ultimate technical authority for a spacecraft program, owning the architecture and all major engineering decisions.

roles.title: Propulsion Engineer 1
roles.description: Supports the design and testing of rocket engines and propulsion systems under senior engineers.

roles.title: Propulsion Engineer
roles.description: Designs, analyzes, and tests the engines and propulsion systems that provide thrust for launch and maneuvering.

roles.title: Propulsion Test Engineer
roles.description: Plans and runs engine hot-fire tests, operating test stands and analyzing performance data.

roles.title: Power Systems Engineer
roles.description: Designs the electrical power systems — solar arrays, batteries, distribution — that keep spacecraft alive.

roles.title: Senior Propulsion Engineer
roles.description: Leads propulsion development programs from architecture through qualification, mentoring engineers and owning design reviews.

roles.title: Propulsion Lead / Manager
roles.description: Owns the propulsion organization for a vehicle or program, coordinating multiple teams and setting technical strategy.

roles.title: AIT Technician 1
roles.description: Assembles and integrates spacecraft components and harnesses in cleanroom environments under guidance.

roles.title: AIT Technician II
roles.description: Performs system-level assembly, integration, and fault-finding on satellites and space hardware.

roles.title: Senior AIT Technician
roles.description: Leads the most complex spacecraft integration tasks, writes assembly procedures, and trains junior technicians.

roles.title: Spacecraft Manufacturing Engineer
roles.description: Designs the processes and tooling to build spacecraft at rate, bridging design and the production floor.

roles.title: AIT Engineer
roles.description: Plans and executes assembly, integration, and test campaigns for spacecraft, owning procedures and test readiness.

roles.title: Senior Manufacturing Engineer (Space)
roles.description: Leads the scale-up of spacecraft production, driving rate, cost, and quality improvements across the factory.

roles.title: Production Manager (Space)
roles.description: Runs spacecraft or component production — schedule, capacity, quality, and team — and is accountable for delivery.

roles.title: Mission Operations Technician
roles.description: Monitors spacecraft health from mission control, reviewing telemetry and logging anomalies during operations.

roles.title: Ground Systems Engineer
roles.description: Builds and maintains the ground systems — software, antennas, data pipelines — that command and receive data from spacecraft.

roles.title: Spacecraft Operations Engineer
roles.description: Commands spacecraft in orbit, resolves anomalies, and executes flight procedures to keep missions healthy.

roles.title: TT&C Engineer
roles.description: Owns the telemetry, tracking, and command links that connect ground operators to spacecraft.

roles.title: Flight Software Engineer
roles.description: Writes the embedded software that runs onboard spacecraft, managing autonomy, fault response, and subsystem control.

roles.title: Senior Spacecraft Operations Engineer
roles.description: Leads spacecraft operations teams, owns mission planning, and directs anomaly response for complex missions or constellations.

roles.title: Mission Director
roles.description: Holds operational authority for a mission, making go/no-go calls and coordinating all teams during critical operations.

roles.title: Launch Operations Technician
roles.description: Supports launch vehicle processing and pad operations, handling propellants and hardware under strict safety protocols.

roles.title: Test Engineer (Space)
roles.description: Plans and runs environmental tests — vibration, thermal-vacuum, shock — that qualify hardware for spaceflight.

roles.title: Launch Operations Engineer
roles.description: Plans and executes launch campaigns — vehicle integration, countdown procedures, and range coordination.

roles.title: Senior Test Engineer (Space)
roles.description: Leads qualification test programs and test facilities, owning the strategy that proves hardware survives launch and space.

roles.title: Launch Director
roles.description: Holds launch authority — leads the countdown, makes the final go/no-go call, and owns launch risk.

roles.title: Space Supply Chain Analyst
roles.description: Sources and manages the specialized parts and materials that go into spacecraft, navigating long-lead aerospace supply chains.

roles.title: Space Systems Analyst
roles.description: Performs the analyses and trade studies that shape mission concepts, architectures, and business cases.

roles.title: Space Policy Analyst
roles.description: Analyzes and navigates the policy, regulatory, and licensing landscape that governs space activities.

roles.title: Spacecraft Program Manager
roles.description: Owns the cost, schedule, and delivery of a spacecraft program, coordinating engineering, supply chain, and customers.

roles.title: Business Development Manager (Space)
roles.description: Wins new business by leading capture and proposal efforts across government and commercial space customers.

roles.title: Director of Space Programs
roles.description: Leads a portfolio of space programs at the executive level, owning P&L, strategy, and organizational direction.

roles.title: Spacecraft Design Drafter
roles.description: Produces engineering drawings and CAD models for spacecraft structures under engineer guidance.

roles.title: Avionics Design Technician
roles.description: Assists avionics engineers with prototyping, schematic capture, and bench testing of flight electronics.

roles.title: Spacecraft CAD Engineer
roles.description: Builds and maintains parametric CAD models of spacecraft assemblies for design and analysis teams.

roles.title: Spacecraft Structures Drafter
roles.description: Drafts structural details and assembly drawings for spacecraft primary structures.

roles.title: Flight Controls Engineer
roles.description: Designs flight control laws and stabilization systems for spacecraft attitude and trajectory.

roles.title: Distinguished Spacecraft Architect
roles.description: Defines end-to-end spacecraft architecture across multiple programs and mentors senior engineers.

roles.title: Director of Spacecraft Engineering
roles.description: Leads the spacecraft engineering organization, owning hiring, roadmap, and program execution.

roles.title: Aerospace Research Engineer
roles.description: Investigates next-generation spacecraft technologies at NASA centers or industry research labs.

roles.title: Propulsion Test Technician
roles.description: Operates propulsion test stands and assists engineers with hot-fire and component testing.

roles.title: Power Systems Technician
roles.description: Assembles and tests spacecraft power systems including batteries, solar arrays, and distribution units.

roles.title: Propulsion Assembly Technician
roles.description: Assembles propulsion components including valves, manifolds, and thrusters per engineering drawings.

roles.title: Avionics Power Technician
roles.description: Supports avionics power distribution testing and integration on spacecraft platforms.

roles.title: Propulsion Combustion Engineer
roles.description: Designs and analyzes combustion chambers and injector hardware for liquid rocket engines.

roles.title: Power Distribution Engineer
roles.description: Designs spacecraft electrical power systems from solar array to load distribution.

roles.title: Principal Propulsion Engineer
roles.description: Sets technical direction for propulsion programs and is the final authority on engine design.

roles.title: Director of Propulsion
roles.description: Leads the propulsion organization, owning roadmap, test infrastructure, and program delivery.

roles.title: Chief Power Systems Engineer
roles.description: Owns end-to-end electrical power system architecture across spacecraft programs.

roles.title: Spacecraft Cleanroom Technician
roles.description: Maintains cleanroom environment and supports spacecraft assembly under contamination-controlled conditions.

roles.title: Composites Layup Technician
roles.description: Performs hand layup and bagging operations for spacecraft composite structures.

roles.title: Harness Assembly Technician
roles.description: Builds spacecraft wire harnesses per IPC standards including crimping, routing, and continuity testing.

roles.title: Mechanical Integration & Test Engineer
roles.description: Plans and executes mechanical integration and test of spacecraft assemblies.

roles.title: Payload Integration Engineer
roles.description: Owns mechanical and electrical integration of payloads onto spacecraft buses.

roles.title: AIT Lead Engineer
roles.description: Leads assembly, integration and test campaigns and is the senior technical authority on the floor.

roles.title: Director of Spacecraft Manufacturing
roles.description: Leads the spacecraft manufacturing organization across multiple production lines and programs.

roles.title: Principal Integration Engineer
roles.description: Sets integration and test standards across programs and resolves the toughest hardware issues.

roles.title: Spacecraft Controller
roles.description: Monitors spacecraft health on console during operations shifts and executes scheduled commanding.

roles.title: Telemetry Analyst
roles.description: Analyzes spacecraft telemetry to characterize subsystem behavior and flag anomalies.

roles.title: Ground Systems Technician
roles.description: Maintains ground station hardware including antennas, RF equipment, and supporting infrastructure.

roles.title: Mission Ops Support Technician
roles.description: Provides backup console coverage and procedure support during mission ops shifts.

roles.title: Flight Software Engineer (On-Board)
roles.description: Develops on-board flight software for spacecraft autonomy, fault management, and command handling.

roles.title: Flight Operations Director
roles.description: Holds final operational authority over spacecraft commanding and anomaly response during a mission.

roles.title: Ground Segment Manager
roles.description: Manages the ground segment including station network, mission control center, and operations contracts.

roles.title: Spacecraft Operations Manager
roles.description: Leads the spacecraft operations team and owns console certification, procedures, and on-call rotations.

roles.title: Launch Pad Technician
roles.description: Supports launch pad operations including fueling, hardware integration, and pre-launch checkouts.

roles.title: Cryogenic Fueling Technician
roles.description: Operates cryogenic fueling systems during pre-launch operations and ground tests.

roles.title: Range Safety Technician
roles.description: Supports range safety operations including telemetry tracking and flight termination system checks.

roles.title: Flight Test Technician
roles.description: Installs and operates instrumentation on flight test vehicles and supports test ops.

roles.title: Range Safety Engineer
roles.description: Designs and certifies range safety systems and trajectories for launch vehicle missions.

roles.title: Flight Termination Systems Engineer
roles.description: Designs and integrates Flight Termination Systems for launch vehicles meeting range safety standards.

roles.title: Launch Vehicle Test Engineer
roles.description: Plans and runs launch vehicle test campaigns including stage tests, static fires, and rehearsals.

roles.title: Launch Pad Lead Engineer
roles.description: Leads launch pad engineering across multiple campaigns and is the on-pad senior technical authority.

roles.title: Director of Launch Operations
roles.description: Leads the launch operations organization, owning cadence, range relationships, and program delivery.

roles.title: Range Safety Lead
roles.description: Owns end-to-end range safety strategy across launch programs and represents the company to range authorities.

roles.title: Space Procurement Analyst
roles.description: Issues purchase orders and evaluates suppliers for spacecraft components and ground systems.

roles.title: Space Contracts Specialist
roles.description: Drafts and administers space industry contracts including NASA, DoD, and commercial agreements.

roles.title: Space Operations Analyst
roles.description: Tracks operational KPIs across space programs and supports planning and reporting cadence.

roles.title: Mission Cost Analyst
roles.description: Builds mission cost estimates and tracks earned value across spacecraft programs.

roles.title: Space Program Analyst
roles.description: Owns program analytics, risk registers, and stakeholder reporting for one or more space programs.

roles.title: Space Compliance Manager
roles.description: Owns ITAR/EAR compliance, export licensing, and regulatory reviews across space programs.

roles.title: Space Operations Manager
roles.description: Leads the business operations team across procurement, scheduling, and contracts for a space program.

roles.title: VP of Space Programs
roles.description: Executive owning the space program portfolio with P&L responsibility across multiple missions.

roles.title: Chief Space Strategy Officer
roles.description: Sets corporate strategy across the company's space business including market entry and partnerships.
